---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new module, flag, or capability for FARSIGHT
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

**What problem does this solve?**
A clear description of the gap or friction you're running into.

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like FARSIGHT to do. If it maps to an existing module (org discovery, recon, threat intel, typosquat, news, web UI), say which.

**Alternatives considered**
Any other approaches you thought about, and why this one seems best.

**Additional context**
Links, examples from other tools, or anything else useful.
